Propitiation of the Lord of Palaniwill give relief in these troubles. Between
34-35 the frrst wife may pass away and the native will wander in foreign
places. He will visit foreign countries in his professional career at about
45-46. At 53 he will earn fame and attain a big position, earn well and own
a house. He will have two sons and two daughters and live upto 74. He
will prosper from 38th year onwards and perform religious functions between
54-60 years.
